mappings.rationale: The retained MappingRule-governs-Adapter fact carries governed_by as its inverse reading, so the legacy domain decision resolves without publishing an inverse shadow edge.
The source-first graph retains the more specific reviewed embedding relation instead of a duplicate generic consumes edge.
The source-first graph retains the more specific reviewed merge relation instead of a duplicate generic consumes edge.
The retained MCPClient-opens-MCPSession fact carries the client participation reading and replaces the redundant inverse shadow assertion.
The source-first graph names the exact scan/signature semantics rather than preserving a generic uses edge.
The source-first graph names the synthesis input semantics rather than preserving a generic consumes edge.
The source-first graph records selection, not causal production, for an already existing retrieved chunk.
The generic lineage link is decomposed into its retry origin and termination condition so both ends of the stop/retry lineage remain explicit.
